rationale: Educ. Code §12.255 governs commissioner authority to grant adult education charter school charters. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: the commissioner may, subject to Subsection (c) and on the basis of an application submitted, grant a charter under the program to an eligible entity to provide an adult education program
_note: Rule text concerns charter school authorization; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
